table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title:
The manifest for one entity (e.g. EHR subject), identifying the entity and optionally specifying top-level items to be included in the Extract. The list actually included may be modified by the `_version_spec_` part of the specification, and also by the link_depth attribute. In repeat (standing order) requests, the final inclusion may be modified by the send_changes_only value for `EXTRACT_UPDATE_SPEC._update_method_`.
Various identifiers may be provided for the entity; these are to be used by the receiver system to locate the entity. The `_extract_id_key_` attribute is used to record the identifier that will be used throughout the Extract for this entity, including in instances of `EXTRACT_ENTITY_IDENTIFIER`.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Identifier by which this entity is known in the Extract. May be one of the other identifiers, e.g. ehr_id or subject_id, or it may be something else, including a simple integer.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Identifier by which this entity is known in the Extract.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: EHR / EMR identifier for the entity at the target system.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: EHR / EMR identifier for the entity at the target system.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Subject (i.e. patient or similar) identifier for the entity at the target system.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Other identifiers that may be used to find the entity at the target system, keyed by type. May include medicare numbers, drivers license number, tax number etc.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Other identifiers that may be used to find the entity at the target system, keyed by type.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

a.title: List of Uids of items to be included in the Extract, in cases where individual items are being requested by id. More typically, this attribute is not used, and the `EXTRACT_SPEC._criteria query_` defines the Extract contents. If set, for openEHR data, these are Uids identifying the version containers.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: List of Uids of items to be included in the Extract, in cases where individual items are being requested by id.

description.value:
The manifest for one entity (e.g. EHR subject), identifying the entity and optionally specifying top-level items to be included in the Extract. The list actually included may be modified by the `_version_spec_` part of the specification, and also by the link_depth attribute. In repeat (standing order) requests, the final inclusion may be modified by the send_changes_only value for `EXTRACT_UPDATE_SPEC._update_method_`.
Various identifiers may be provided for the entity; these are to be used by the receiver system to locate the entity. The `_extract_id_key_` attribute is used to record the identifier that will be used throughout the Extract for this entity, including in instances of `EXTRACT_ENTITY_IDENTIFIER`.

definition.value:
The manifest for one entity (e.g. EHR subject), identifying the entity and optionally specifying top-level items to be included in the Extract. The list actually included may be modified by the `_version_spec_` part of the specification, and also by the link_depth attribute. In repeat (standing order) requests, the final inclusion may be modified by the send_changes_only value for `EXTRACT_UPDATE_SPEC._update_method_`.
Various identifiers may be provided for the entity; these are to be used by the receiver system to locate the entity. The `_extract_id_key_` attribute is used to record the identifier that will be used throughout the Extract for this entity, including in instances of `EXTRACT_ENTITY_IDENTIFIER`.

short.value: Identifier by which this entity is known in the Extract.

definition.value: Identifier by which this entity is known in the Extract. May be one of the other identifiers, e.g. ehr_id or subject_id, or it may be something else, including a simple integer.

short.value: EHR / EMR identifier for the entity at the target system.

definition.value: EHR / EMR identifier for the entity at the target system.
Subject (i.e. patient or similar) identifier for the entity at the target system.

short.value: Other identifiers that may be used to find the entity at the target system, keyed by type.

definition.value: Other identifiers that may be used to find the entity at the target system, keyed by type. May include medicare numbers, drivers license number, tax number etc.

short.value: List of Uids of items to be included in the Extract, in cases where individual items are being requested by id.

definition.value: List of Uids of items to be included in the Extract, in cases where individual items are being requested by id. More typically, this attribute is not used, and the `EXTRACT_SPEC._criteria query_` defines the Extract contents. If set, for openEHR data, these are Uids identifying the version containers.

The manifest for one entity (e.g. EHR subject), identifying the entity and optionally specifying top-level items to be included in the Extract. The list actually included may be modified by the `_version_spec_` part of the specification, and also by the link_depth attribute. In repeat (standing order) requests, the final inclusion may be modified by the send_changes_only value for `EXTRACT_UPDATE_SPEC._update_method_`.
Various identifiers may be provided for the entity; these are to be used by the receiver system to locate the entity. The `_extract_id_key_` attribute is used to record the identifier that will be used throughout the Extract for this entity, including in instances of `EXTRACT_ENTITY_IDENTIFIER`.

short.value: Identifier by which this entity is known in the Extract.

definition.value: Identifier by which this entity is known in the Extract. May be one of the other identifiers, e.g. ehr_id or subject_id, or it may be something else, including a simple integer.

short.value: EHR / EMR identifier for the entity at the target system.

definition.value: EHR / EMR identifier for the entity at the target system.
Subject (i.e. patient or similar) identifier for the entity at the target system.

short.value: Other identifiers that may be used to find the entity at the target system, keyed by type.

definition.value: Other identifiers that may be used to find the entity at the target system, keyed by type. May include medicare numbers, drivers license number, tax number etc.

short.value: List of Uids of items to be included in the Extract, in cases where individual items are being requested by id.

definition.value: List of Uids of items to be included in the Extract, in cases where individual items are being requested by id. More typically, this attribute is not used, and the `EXTRACT_SPEC._criteria query_` defines the Extract contents. If set, for openEHR data, these are Uids identifying the version containers.
